# Test Case Design - CommGateway

High-level test cases for the **CommGateway** architecture model. Communication Gateway: CAN/LIN routing, signal mapping and bus monitoring.

---
## Test Case: TC.001 - canrouter init & cyclic

**Given** the ECU has powered on
**When** `Com_Canrouter_Init` then `Com_Canrouter_Step` are called
**Then** the phase becomes RUN and `value` is a filtered, clamped sample (REQ-COM-CAN7)
